purpose: Prevent lost-stage restores by recording governed stage dependencies, outputs, and latest successful state.
problems_addressed: Restoring a valid stable ZIP can lose later governed stage deltas.
The runtime needs to know which stage receipts and outputs supersede older release bundles.
Repair stages need a durable ledger entry even when no stable export is produced.
ledger_update_required_after: blocked stage when a blocked receipt is committed
restore_policy: If pointer is unavailable, use latest PASS ledger entry.
Only then fall back to latest recovery-proven stable baseline.
validity_rules: A PASS ledger entry must reference an existing receipt.
A PASS ledger entry must reference a git commit.
Stage outputs listed in a PASS entry must exist at commit time.
Blocked entries may exist but must not advance latest_pass.
non_goals: F2 does not implement a transactional runner.
F2 does not export a new baseline.
F2 does not perform restore proof.
